records.question: Who are the staff members assigned to problems where other_log_details is exactly c?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
WHERE problem_log.other_log_details = 'c'
records.pred_sql: select staff.staff_id from staff join problem_log on staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id where problem_log.other_log_details = 'c' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find staff members who are assigned to problems in Problem_Log where other_log_details is exactly 'c'. This requires joining Staff and Problem_Log on staff_id and filtering on other_log_details.

records.question: Which staff members have the last name Lynch and have other staff details exactly as b?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
WHERE staff.other_staff_details = 'b' AND staff.staff_last_name = 'Lynch'
records.pred_sql: select staff.staff_id from staff where lower(staff.staff_last_name) = 'lynch' and staff.other_staff_details = 'b' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to filter the Staff table for records where staff_last_name is 'Lynch' and other_staff_details is exactly 'b', then select staff_id with a limit of 5.

records.question: Which staff with the last name Lynch and other_staff_details exactly b are assigned to problems where other_log_details is exactly d and log_entry_fix is exactly x on or before 2001-05-14 10:03:53?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
WHERE problem_log.log_entry_date <= '2001-05-14 10:03:53' AND staff.other_staff_details = 'b' AND problem_log.other_log_details = 'd' AND problem_log.log_entry_fix = 'x' AND staff.staff_last_name = 'Lynch'
records.pred_sql: select staff.staff_id from staff join problem_log on staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id where staff.staff_last_name = 'Lynch' and staff.other_staff_details = 'b' and problem_log.other_log_details = 'd' and problem_log.log_entry_fix = 'x' and problem_log.log_entry_date <= '2001-05-14 10:03:53' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find staff assigned to problems (via Problem_Log.assigned_to_staff_id) where staff_last_name is 'Lynch' and other_staff_details is 'b', and the related Problem_Log rows have other_log_details = 'd', log_entry_fix = 'x', and log_entry_date <= '2001-05-14 10:03:53'.

records.question: Which staff members named Jolie Weber handled problems reported on or before 1996-04-19 15:54:13 and closed on or after 1974-09-20 13:42:19, involving product details exactly q, with log entry description v, log entry fix o, and other problem details l?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
JOIN problems ON problem_log.problem_id = problems.problem_id
JOIN product ON problems.product_id = product.product_id
WHERE problem_log.log_entry_description = 'v' AND problems.date_problem_reported <= '1996-04-19 15:54:13' AND problems.date_problem_closed >= '1974-09-20 13:42:19' AND staff.staff_last_name = 'Weber' AND staff.staff_first_name = 'Jolie' AND product.product_details = 'q' AND problem_log.log_entry_fix = 'o' AND problems.other_problem_details = 'l'
records.pred_sql: select staff.staff_id from staff join problem_log on staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id join problems on problem_log.problem_id = problems.problem_id join product on problems.product_id = product.product_id where lower(staff.staff_first_name) = 'jolie' and lower(staff.staff_last_name) = 'weber' and problems.date_problem_reported <= '1996-04-19 15:54:13' and problems.date_problem_closed >= '1974-09-20 13:42:19' and product.product_details = 'q' and problem_log.log_entry_description = 'v' and problem_log.log_entry_fix = 'o' and problems.other_problem_details = 'l' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find staff named Jolie Weber who were assigned to handle problems matching the given date constraints, product details, log entry description, log entry fix, and other problem details. This requires joining Staff, Problem_Log, Problems, and Product tables, and applying the specified filte

records.question: Which staff members were assigned problems logged on or before 1982-11-17 06:05:52?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
JOIN problems ON problem_log.problem_id = problems.problem_id
JOIN product ON problems.product_id = product.product_id
WHERE problem_log.log_entry_date <= '1982-11-17 06:05:52'
records.pred_sql: select staff.staff_id from staff join problem_log on staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id where problem_log.log_entry_date <= '1982-11-17 06:05:52' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find staff who were assigned to problems in Problem_Log where log_entry_date is on or before '1982-11-17 06:05:52'. We'll join Problem_Log with Staff using assigned_to_staff_id.

records.question: Which staff members named Christop Berge handled problems with description c and other details f that were closed on or after 2004-06-20 01:08:25, where their log entries have description p and fix i?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
JOIN problems ON problem_log.problem_id = problems.problem_id
WHERE problems.other_problem_details = 'f' AND problems.date_problem_closed >= '2004-06-20 01:08:25' AND staff.staff_first_name = 'Christop' AND problem_log.log_entry_description = 'p' AND problem_log.log_entry_fix = 'i' AND staff.staff_last_name = 'Berge' AND problems.problem_description = 'c'
records.pred_sql: select staff.staff_id from staff join problem_log on staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id join problems on problem_log.problem_id = problems.problem_id where lower(staff.staff_first_name || ' ' || staff.staff_last_name) like '%christop%berge%' and lower(problems.problem_description) like '%c%' and lower(problems.other_problem_details) like '%f%' and problems.date_problem_closed >= '2004-06-20 01:08:25' and lower(problem_log.log_entry_description) like '%p%' and lower(problem_log.log_entry_fix) like '%i%' limit 5;
records.thought: We need staff named 'Christop Berge' who were assigned to problem logs with log_entry_description containing 'p' and log_entry_fix containing 'i', for problems with description containing 'c', other details containing 'f', and closed on or after the specified date.

records.question: Which staff members with other_staff_details exactly 'b' have problem logs where the log_entry_fix is exactly 'x'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN problem_log ON staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id
JOIN problems ON problem_log.problem_id = problems.problem_id
WHERE problem_log.log_entry_fix = 'x' AND staff.other_staff_details = 'b'
records.pred_sql: select staff.staff_id from staff join problem_log on staff.staff_id = problem_log.assigned_to_staff_id where staff.other_staff_details = 'b' and problem_log.log_entry_fix = 'x' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find staff members whose other_staff_details is exactly 'b' and who are assigned to problem logs where log_entry_fix is exactly 'x'. This requires joining Staff and Problem_Log on staff_id and filtering both conditions.
